title: Biome Powder: Paint Biomes
description: Change Biomes in your Builds to make them Extra Special! Survival-Friendly & for Creative. Modify Foliage & Grass colors into all 16 vanilla colors.
body:
![Biome Powder Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1fc057ab7161a3c70393305c0573b2748f312a5.png)

Allows you to change the biome in a Survival-Friendly way. Simply right-click with a Biome Powder to use it. The Biome Powders are also really useful for Builders in Creative Mode. You always get **8** Biome Powder from a single crafting process. ## 📶 Sizes Biome Powders come in 3 different **Sizes**: - Small - Mid - Big Each Biome Powder has 2-3 Ingredients. The amount of times you use these Ingredients while Crafting will Change the size. ### Small Use Ingredients once for small Biome Powder. This is meant to be used for details, corrections and for pathways. ![Small Cherry Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d81ff9e2f7fbf32ca2f55384cc3b27c08d71b65.png) ### Mid Use Ingredients twice for mid-sized Biome Powder. you can use this to fill rather small areas. ![Mid Savanna Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa1a0d33040a87434449f9db5b5c1ff13772628.png) ### Big For most bigger areas, you will want to use the big biome powder. It is crafted by using the ingredients three times. ![Big Forest Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be637484afd0ad30318e3e6c849bafd300cd1ba5.png) ## 🏞️ Included Biomes ### Plains Short Grass and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Plains Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98b3a127f3bea18b2782fa2ffaa7e961038444df.png) ### Snowy Plains Short Grass, Snowball and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Snowy Plains Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6af77d4663270af39a76047c9fb5ff04a9c771b.png) ### Forest Oak Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Forest Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b526ded304977bb818bf2410354b8781668582.png) ### Dark Forest Dark Oak Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Dark Forest Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51cd97c52c5e4efe8669a2d758632d41b91dcf39.png) ### Birch Forest Birch Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![NON FUNCTIONING Mid Birch Forest Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8798fb5a0174b5a9d6f2276e1fd9021915515ce.png) ### Cherry Grove Cherry Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Cherry Grove Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd94277ded497a8bb9b5225f59a3f58de332e8db.png) ### Savanna Acacia Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Savanna Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa1a0d33040a87434449f9db5b5c1ff13772628.png) ### Desert Sand and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Desert Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c00a4b15111a6bb595f3e492d3472aaac478513.png) ### Badlands Red Sand and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Desert Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1348147eb7de39eb7181fd956b8c99b252126a0c.png) ### Swamp Lily Pad and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Swamp Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/210649ded5e912284ad962d256085c1fb4d5b6c6.png) ### Mangrove Swamp Mangrove Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Mangrove Swamp Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff5ed43eca311d2ec0f3b2c1aef99235a5e0a940.png) ### Jungle Jungle Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Jungle Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d077069ed86bdf5436b4044498126cdf5f5acb.png) ### Taiga Spruce Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Mid Taiga Biome Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb2c575fea8b9c0c37b88c1a49b518b668883283.png) ### Snowy Taiga Spruce Sapling, Snowball and Lapis Lazuli ![Snowy Taiga Ingredients/Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3922353cdc92d418c0883cbbe31ab676c347c2b4.png) ### Pale Gardens Pale Oak Sapling and Lapis Lazuli ![Pale Oak Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33c7397e0800de0e05e96afc48acfda10b02c175.png) ### Ocean Seagrass and Lapis Lazuli ![crafting recipe for ocean biome powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb484bcc3eda41ce3112932f979f4a5edfb2410d.png) ### Lukewarm Ocean 2x Seagrass and Lapis Lazuli ![crafting recipe for lukewarm ocean biome powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3909ff91befec89c3edce9e04c255925f9d34efe.png)! ### Warm Ocean Seagrass, Sea Pickle and Lapis Lazuli ![crafting recipe for warm ocean biome powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/add782bd987f8d923a956e1df53534167b10c438.png)! ### Cold Ocean Seagrass, Snow and Lapis Lazuli ![crafting recipe for cold ocean biome powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0739e30f4c88742eda4dce80af0b67c417e4cd06.png) ### Frozen Ocean Seagrass, Ice and Lapis Lazuli ![crafting recipe for frozen ocean biome powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d384305a4fe3ee1a0067e488af8e708efba80d88.png)
Legacy ### Colored Plains (1.2-1.3 only) Short Grass, any Dye and Lapislazuli ![Color Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NbjFQwaF/images/9a7a10381aeaba7d67604ab44fbe3d064a0f135f.webp)
## 📗 How to add all Recipes to the Recipe Book? ### Without Commands By simply crafting and using the **Biome Powder Knowledge Book** you will gain all the recipes. ![Biome Powder Knowledge Books Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c7ff3a01346924554497120b18c04fe3b1428d.png) To craft Knowledge Books, you will need "[Craftable Knowledge Book](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-knowledge-book)". ### With Commands You can add all recipes to the Recipe Book by using the command `/function biome_powder:unlock_all_recipes`. If you want to give all players all Recipes, use `/execute as @a run function biome_powder:unlock_all_recipes` instead. ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ⚙️ Compatibility Do not use an "Unlock all achievements" datapack after having installed this datapack!. Recipes are Subject to Change in Future Versions. ## 🤝 Attributions Datapack is loosely inspired by Terraria ## ❗Issues and Suggestions Please report issues on [My Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H).
